title: Disparo imediato ('Executar agora') para agentes ops existentes

steps.label: 01 · Spec
notes: Lendo a issue #66 e redigindo a spec
Lendo issue #66 e contexto do repositório
Escrevendo critérios de aceite em linguagem de cliente
Spec concluída com 6 critérios de aceite e postada no issue

steps.label: 03 · Code
steps.summary: Endpoint POST /api/ops/agents/{agent_key}/run + run_agent_now + botão Executar agora (3 arquivos fonte)
notes: Briefing coder: endpoint POST /api/ops/agents/{agent_key}/run + botão Executar agora
reading approved spec and planning implementation
inspected backend endpoints, worker schedule ids, frontend API and dashboard
added generic agent schedule registry, Temporal trigger method, and backend endpoint
wired AgentsDashboard run-now action and frontend ops-api client
py_compile and i18n JSON validation green; frontend typecheck skipped without node_modules

steps.label: 04 · Tests
notes: Briefing tester: pytest endpoint + verify-*.mjs UI wiring
Tester started adding backend and frontend coverage for issue #66
frontend wiring green: node --test scripts/verify-issue66-wiring.mjs passed 6/6

steps.label: 05 · Test review
steps.summary: 1 iteração: +2 testes (403 tenant-denied; RPCError não-NOT_FOUND ≠ 409). pytest 76 passed
notes: Iteração 1: 2 lacunas reais (403 tenant-unresolved; RPCError não-NOT_FOUND não vira 409). Devolvendo ao tester.
Iteration 1 added tenant-denied and non-409 generic-error run-now endpoint coverage; pytest green: 76 passed.

steps.label: 06 · Code review
steps.summary: Aprovado: 6/6 ACs, sem bugs/segurança/regressão. Review postado no PR #69
notes: Revisando diff completo: correção, segurança, regressão
